//: AI-deletable proof target (Doc 07 §1, C3/L2). Typechecks the deterministic core — model, execution, storage, capture, replay, diff, config, services, shared, observability — with classify/ + inference/ deleted. Excludes the adapters (cli, mcp), which are the AI-wiring layer and legitimately reference classify at their composition roots. If this compiles with classify/inference removed, AI is proven non-load-bearing.
